project_info_title: Wellness-focused luxury living in Dubai Islands
project_info_text:
House of Well is a premium clubhouse residence designed around abundance, comfort and well-being on Dubai Islands. The project brings together elegant architecture, panoramic windows, high ceilings and smart home systems in a refined island setting.

With thoughtfully planned 1 to 3 bedroom residences, podium villas and duplex-style layouts, the development combines contemporary luxury with wellness-driven amenities, semi-furnished kitchens with branded Miele appliances, and a lifestyle shaped by balance, privacy and resort-inspired living.
amenities_title: Infrastructure and landscaping of the residential complex
map_text:
Located on Dubai Islands, House of Well enjoys a prime waterfront address within one of Dubai’s most ambitious new lifestyle destinations. The setting combines island calm, marina access, resort character and fast connections back to the city.

Residents benefit from a rare balance of wellness-oriented living and long-term investment appeal, surrounded by beaches, promenades, hospitality destinations and the wider future vision of Dubai Islands.
footer_tagline: Luxury wellness residences in Dubai Islands
